growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: gold.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: patric.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: Z8XS-P (phosphorus-free Z8XS medium) supplemented with methylphosphonic acid (MPn) as sole phosphorus source

sec.method: reported (slope of cumulative methane release measured by GC headspace technique over 0-32 h incubation of culture grown in MPn medium under continuous illumination 3.2-3.7 µmol photons m-2 s-1; prevailing chlorophyll a concentration in the culture was 2.4 mg/L)

growth_records.cite: Teikari et al. Strains of the toxic and bloom-forming Nodularia spumigena (cyanobacteria) can degrade methylphosphonate and release methane. The ISME Journal (2018). DOI:10.1038/s41396-018-0056-6. [PMC5955973]
growth_records.snippet: The rate of the methane flux from N. spumigena UHCC 0039 culture to the gaseous environment was determined to be 1.84 nmol h−1 per mg of chlorophyll a, while prevailing chlorophyll a concentration in the culture was 2.4
growth_records.notes: Directly reported specific methane secretion rate for N. spumigena UHCC 0039 growing on methylphosphonic acid (MPn) as sole P source; rate is normalized to chlorophyll a (a biomass proxy for this photoautotroph), not to gDW, and the paper gives no chlorophyll-to-gDW conversion factor so units are left as reported (no unit conversion performed). No numeric growth rate (mu) or doubling time is reported anywhere in this paper for N. spumigena under any condition -- the paper only states qualitatively that 'Maximal growth rates in studied conditions were obtained in the cultures growing in Pi medium,' so growth_rate_per_h/doubling_time_h are left null rather than invented. Cultures were maintained under continuous illumination (photoautotrophic, aerobic); no cultivation temperature or pH is stated in the text.
